task_description: Implement automatic certificate date extraction from Google Drive PDF links. When the admin clicks 'Fetch dari Link' on the certificate tab, the system should download the PDF from Google Drive, extract text, find date patterns (YYYY/MM/DD or YYYY-MM-DD), take the last date found, convert to Japanese format (YYYY年MM月DD日), and auto-fill the certificate date fields. This replicates the Apps Script functionality in the web portal.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds cleanly. API route at /api/extract-cert-date is included in the build output. Review issues addressed: added sertifikatSenmonkyuu extraction, removed rawText from API responses. No test framework in this project.
